name: Golden Crust Bakery
about: We believe in the magic of flour, water, and time. Our artisan breads and pastries are hand-crafted daily using century-old sourdough techniques and the finest local ingredients.

bestSellers.name: Butter Croissant
bestSellers.description: Perfectly flaky, buttery, and baked fresh every morning.

bestSellers.name: Country Sourdough
bestSellers.description: Our signature loaf with a thick crust and airy, tangy interior.

bestSellers.name: Dark Chocolate Tart
bestSellers.description: Rich Belgian chocolate ganache in a crisp butter shell.
